vision.verse1: "See, I am doing a new thing! Now it springs up; do you not perceive it?
vision.verse2: I am making a way in the wilderness and streams in the wasteland."

about.summary:
At this critical moment,
the wind of the Holy Spirit is blowing to every corner of this generation.
God's will is not only within the four walls of the church,
but to expand the place of the tent,
entering AI generations, forward-looking technology, business transformation,
medical missions, and environmental governance to take authority!

detail.heading: About 2026 International Summit
detail.intro:
We firmly believe that 2026 will be a year of "alignment" for Asian churches and workplace leaders.
The Lord is calling His elite soldiers, whether at the forefront of the digital wave, or in the position of guarding the created earth, to arise and shine, winning the cultural mountaintops for the Lord.

points.title: Spiritual Convergence
points.desc: The "2026 Impact Asia Alliance Summit" is about to begin! We see that God's glorious plan has been set in motion. This is not just a gathering, but a feast preparing for the future of God's Kingdom.

points.title: Critical Turning Point
points.desc: As AI reshapes the world, we are standing at the most critical turning point of human civilization. In Oct 2026, the IAA Summit will initiate a divine conversation in Phoenix, Arizona.

points.title: Role of Stewardship
points.desc: In the future AI era, how humans can return to the role of "steward," finding a way of coexistence between technology and the soul. This is more than just a gathering of digital intelligence and lifestyle.

points.title: Rebirth in Wilderness
points.desc: It is a rebirth of thought in the magnificent desert landscape. We sincerely invite you to walk with leaders from around the world, gathering for the peace, wisdom, and love of the future world.

points.title: Vision & Commitment
points.desc: The church should enter society and produce world influence. Let us stand on the breach together, becoming vessels to receive new wine, blessing the union of North American and Asia-Pacific churches.
